svg.text: Okai BMS Display — Full System Wiring
LILYGO T-Display-S3 · 4× Ruipu 10S4P BMS · 3× Illuminated 8mm Buttons · VESC 5V Rail
━━━ COMMON GND BUS (all components share this rail) ━━━
Each pack: 3 wires — GND, TX, RX(shared)
GND common with all packs + board
GPIO2 TX heartbeat → ALL pack RX (shared bus)
⏚ = GND symbol (all tie to common bus)
Pin layout matches T-Display-S3 left/right header as shipped · Config.h FW v0.1.0
Okai BMS Display v0.1.0 · docs/System_Wiring.svg · All buttons active-LOW (INPUT_PULLUP) · BMS 9600 baud 3.3V logic
